description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte olive drab and black color scheme, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent vertical foregrip mounted on the lower rail, enhancing control during rapid fire. The upper receiver is equipped with a rail system, supporting a compact optical sight for improved aiming accuracy. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, which helps reduce visible muzzle flash. The pistol grip and adjustable stock are ergonomically designed for comfort and adaptability. The overall build suggests a robust, lightweight construction suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern olive drab tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, detachable magazine, and compact optic sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, vertical foregrip, detachable magazine, and mounted optic.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and alignment of the foregrip and optic.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clearer detail on the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the adjustable stock and the alignment of the upper receiver and sight.
